Wooties! I got mine 3/18/03 AND the Slime Blood of Cazic Thule the SAME night.. (2 bloods dropped that night on E-marr BTW *boggle*) I dyed it dark red, and I am one happy necro..

Inny your next!

Finally Got it
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2002 at 7:49 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361878983
4 posts
After 3 years of playing and having an ungodly hard time with plains items. I finally hit the gold.

Before this only item I ever got that was planor was crown of bone caster.

In one raid The following droped and I was only necro.

2 Blighted caps - I Got it - 1 Rotted
3 cryosilk sleeves - I got one =D
1 - Blighted gloves - I got it =D
2 Blighted pants - I got it - 1 rotted
1 - Blighted boots - I got it crap
and finally on the last drop of the swing shift camp.
THE BLIGHTED F00CKING ROBE. OMG I LOVE IT - Finally I got what i dreamed of since i first heard of its existance.
▲ Page top

# May 22 2001 at 2:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760269454
2 posts
well...it only took 20 fear raids, but i got mine the other night, thank god. i was invited by the raid / guild leader, who was a good friend of mine, and he encouraged me to roll against one of the guild necros. i won and gave the other necro my froglock robe. it seemed like the right thing to do. in any case, /rude verant, for making this item so ungodly rare.

auspix d'zyan
56th teir'dal nerfomancer
rodcet nife <highland clan>

Anonymous
Appearance:Dark blue almost black, with normal blue design woven on the front, wrist, and it looks like on the legs.
Looks awesome on a dark elf.

And to the Cleric on 7th hammer who'd "I'll only join the fear raid if I get a roll on blighted robes for my alt cuz our guild (who shall remain nameless as some of them aren't total knobs) doesn't do fear, it's not worth our time" I got mine, you know where yours will fit.

Ak
